stemHtml:
An aircraft has received the following take-off clearance: "TC-BTO, CLIMB STRAIGHT AHEAD UNTIL 4000 FT, BEFORE TURNING RIGHT HEADING 270, REPORT RIGHT TURN. RUNWAY 09 CLEARED FOR TAKE-OFF."

After take-off, the aircraft is experiencing communications receiver failure and the pilots need to transmit blind their report to ATC, followed by a complete repetition. What phraseology shall they use?

"TC-BTO, TRANSMITTING BLIND DUE TO RECEIVER FAILURE...

options.a: ...RIGHT TURN HEADING 270 MAINTAINING 4000 FT. CONTINUING VFR FOR LANDING RWY 09."
options.b: ...RIGHT TURN MAINTAINING 4000 FT. NEXT REPORT AT TIME 1201. ALL STATIONS RADIO CHECK."
options.c: ...RIGHT TURN. CONTINUING VFR FOR LANDING RWY 09. NEXT REPORT FINAL."
options.d: ...RIGHT TURN HEADING 270 SPEED 160 KNOTS. CONTINUING VFR FOR LANDING RWY 09."
